response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 85
REASON: This document presents itself as a joint "ASPCA Animal Poison Control Center / American Veterinary Medical Association" standard reference, but no such co-branded "Standard Veterinary Toxicology Reference" exists; the formatting, co-attribution, and several claims (e.g., "there is no safe dose" and the specific framing) are inconsistent with actual ASPCA APCC publications, suggesting this was composed to look authoritative rather than being a genuine institutional document.
